TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pan Sikuang Simpu == Pan Sikuang Simpu (France: Rev. Maurice Poinsot, 'Amis: Mamet, M.E.P., 1932 miheca 9 folad 12 romi'ad-2018 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad), no Kawas ngangan ci Mu Liciu, o nano France Paris Wayfan Sinkiwkay a torokos, Tinsokiw i Taywan a simpu. Rayray ato katadamaan Pan Sikuang Simpu masofoc i France. I 1949 miheca, mitilid i Paris sinkakoyin; 1957 miheca, mapatireng to no Tinsokiw a Simpu; I 1959 miheca, maocor no Tinsokiw Paris Wayfang Titokiwkay (Missions Etrang√®res de Paris, MEP) maocor tayni i Kalingko no Taywan mala patenakay. Katayalan ni Pan Sikuang Simpu mipatenak itira i Posko, Fuli no Kalingko, kawali no Tarawadaw 'Amis a niyaro', ikor no pipatenak ni Pan Sikuang Simpu, tadamaan ko nidemakan ningra saka pacekilan no itiraay finawlan, sacisowal sa ko finawlan a pangangan "O coyoh no kawaliay" . O sapikihamonan ni Pan Sikuang Simpu to kasaniyaro', minanam to kowaping, Payrang sowal, 'Amis a sowal . I Afih niyaro' ko aro' ni Pan Sikuang Simpu, saka pangangan sa ko 'Amis a tamdaw i cingraan i paka ci "Mamet" han, o patodong tata'ang ko kamay ningra, mamamamet to kamay i mimetmet ko kamay ningra, ano eca ci'icel ko pimetmet saan ko pasowal . I 1967 miheca, patireng to Hualiensien Lute hopedan kociwsiya. Halafinay miheca i, o sapipa'icel to niyaro'ay a 'Amis tamdaw saka pi'imer to sowal no niyah ato pidotoc to ponka, minanam to sowal no 'Amis, aci Rev. Fr. Louis Pourrias tatosa malekapot mikawit to sowal no 'Amis "'Amis sowal ‚Äď France sowal", "'Amis Fangcalay cudad", "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" a sakadademak4) . Sa:an i, I niyaro' no 'Amis patireng to Yociying, paiyoan ato kadadipotan no mato'asay no niyaro'; halafin ko patado ato mikihar to dadamaen no niyaro', saka falic no niyaro' a ponka, kiwiko, isingan, kicay a demak, "O coyoh no kawaliay" han ko pipangangan i cingraan. I 2015 miheca, o nano France a pitelek to "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" (Dictionnaire Amis-Fran√ßais), milaheci to sapiterek to ponka no 'Amis, orasaka mapakaolah no Conghuaminko kiwikopo patodong to "105 miheca tadamaanay sakiniyah sowal kompay" . I 2017 miheca, Conghuaminko sifo mihamon mikinafalahay demak 60 miheca a roray, o Lalomaan nidemakay masadakay patodong to kacingangan no Conghuaminko . I 2018 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad, ciadada to atay a kang a mapatay, 89 no 'orip ningra i hakal . Toya miheca 3 folad 24 romi'ad, itira i pipatadaan ningra Afih Tinsokiwkay mimisa padongos itiya, o Yincuminco wuyinhuy patodong to katadamaan ningra to saki yincumin no Taywan, patodong to "saka tosa yincumin tadamanay a pakaolah" . I 8 folad 11 romi'ad, Yincuminco wiyinhuy kakeridan ci Iciyang Parod midayhiw to Congtong ci Cay Inwen patodong to patadamaan no Congtong, todong no Cenfo saki ci Pan Sikuang Simpuan kaitini i Taywan to 58 miheca a patado, tadamaan ko pidipot ato pikinafalah to 'orip saki yincumin, "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" mikawit to ponka miterek a demak ko piahowid .
S.PHON: == pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u == pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u (fran ¶…ô: r…ôb~v. mao~u~uri ¶…ô po~uinso~ut, °amis: mam…ôt, m.…ô.p., **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ-**** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ), no~u kawas ŇčaŇčan ¶i mo~u~u …ĺi ¶io~u~u, o~u nano~u fran ¶…ô paris wajfan sinkiwkaj a to~uro~uko~us, tinso~ukiw i tajwan a simpo~u~u. rajraj ato~u kata…¨~…ģamaan pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u maso~ufo~u ¶ i fran ¶…ô. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i paris sinkako~ujin; **** mińß…ô ¶a, mapatir…ôŇč to~u no~u tinso~ukiw a simpo~u~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mao~u ¶o~ur no~u tinso~ukiw paris wajfaŇč tito~ukiwkaj (missio~uns …ôtraŇč*r…ôs …¨~…ģ…ô paris, m…ôp) mao~u ¶o~ur tajni i ka…ĺiŇčko~u no~u tajwan ma…ĺa pat…ônakaj. kataja…ĺan ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u mipat…ônak itira i po~usko~u, fo~u~u…ĺi no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, kawa…ĺi no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw °amis a nijaro~u °, iko~ur no~u pipat…ônak ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u, ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan niŇčra saka pa ¶…ôki…ĺan no~u itiraaj finaw…ĺan, sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u finaw…ĺan a paŇčaŇčan "o~u ¶o~ujo~uńß no~u kawa…ĺiaj" . o~u sapikińßamo~unan ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u to~u kasanijaro~u °, minanam to~u ko~uwapiŇč, pajraŇč so~uwa…ĺ, °amis a so~uwa…ĺ . i afińß nijaro~u ° ko~u aro~u ° ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u, saka paŇčaŇčan sa ko~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw i ¶iŇčraan i paka ¶i "mam…ôt" ńßan, o~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč tata °aŇč ko~u kamaj niŇčra, mamamam…ôt to~u kamaj i mim…ôtm…ôt ko~u kamaj niŇčra, ano~u …ô ¶a ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u pim…ôtm…ôt saan ko~u paso~uwa…ĺ . i **** mińß…ô ¶a, patir…ôŇč to~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ônsi…ôn …ĺo~u~ut…ô ńßo~up…ô…¨~…ģan ko~u ¶iwsija. ńßa…ĺafinaj mińß…ô ¶a i, o~u sapipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u nijaro~u °aj a °amis tam…¨~…ģaw saka pi °im…ôr to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u nijańß ato~u pi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u po~unka, minanam to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, a ¶i r…ôb~v. fr. …ĺo~uo~u~uis po~uo~u~urrias tato~usa ma…ĺ…ôkapo~ut mikawit to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis " °amis so~uwa…ĺ * fran ¶…ô so~uwa…ĺ", " °amis faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ", "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" a saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak*) . sa:an i, i nijaro~u ° no~u °amis patir…ôŇč to~u jo~u ¶ijiŇč, paijo~uan ato~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģipo~utan no~u mato~u °asaj no~u nijaro~u °; ńßa…ĺafin ko~u pata…¨~…ģo~u ato~u mikińßar to~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģama…ôn no~u nijaro~u °, saka fa…ĺi ¶ no~u nijaro~u ° a po~unka, kiwiko~u, isiŇčan, ki ¶aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, "o~u ¶o~ujo~uńß no~u kawa…ĺiaj" ńßan ko~u pipaŇčaŇčan i ¶iŇčraan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u nano~u fran ¶…ô a pit…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" (…¨~…ģi ¶tio~unnair…ô amis-fran*ais), mi…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u sapit…ôr…ôk to~u po~unka no~u °amis, o~urasaka mapakao~u…ĺańß no~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u kiwiko~upo~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u "*** mińß…ô ¶a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj sakinijańß so~uwa…ĺ ko~umpaj" . i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u mińßamo~un mikinafa…ĺańßaj …¨~…ģ…ômak ** mińß…ô ¶a a ro~uraj, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan ni…¨~…ģ…ômakaj masa…¨~…ģakaj pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan no~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u . i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u ataj a kaŇč a mapataj, ** no~u °o~urip niŇčra i ńßaka…ĺ . to~uja mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, itira i pipata…¨~…ģaan niŇčra afińß tinso~ukiwkaj mimisa pa…¨~…ģo~uŇčo~us itija, o~u jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u wo~u~ujinńßo~u~uj pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u kata…¨~…ģamaan niŇčra to~u saki jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan, pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u "saka to~usa jin ¶o~u~umin ta…¨~…ģamanaj a pakao~u…ĺańß" . i * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u wijinńßo~u~uj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i i ¶ijaŇč paro~u…¨~…ģ mi…¨~…ģajńßiw to~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ¶i ¶aj inw…ôn pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u pata…¨~…ģamaan no~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ¶…ônfo~u saki ¶i pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~uan kaitini i tajwan to~u ** mińß…ô ¶a a pata…¨~…ģo~u, ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u pikinafa…ĺańß to~u °o~urip saki jin ¶o~u~umin, "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" mikawit to~u po~unka mit…ôr…ôk a …¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ .
S.FORM: == Pan Sikuang Simpu == Pan Sikuang Simpu (France: Rev. Maurice Poinsot, 'Amis: Mamet, M.E.P., 1932 miheca 9 folad 12 romi'ad-2018 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad), no Kawas ngangan ci Mu Liciu, o nano France Paris Wayfan Sinkiwkay a torokos, Tinsokiw i Taywan a simpu. Rayray ato katadamaan Pan Sikuang Simpu masofoc i France. I 1949 miheca, mitilid i Paris sinkakoyin; 1957 miheca, mapatireng to no Tinsokiw a Simpu; I 1959 miheca, maocor no Tinsokiw Paris Wayfang Titokiwkay (Missions Etrang√®res de Paris, MEP) maocor tayni i Kalingko no Taywan mala patenakay. Katayalan ni Pan Sikuang Simpu mipatenak itira i Posko, Fuli no Kalingko, kawali no Tarawadaw 'Amis a niyaro', ikor no pipatenak ni Pan Sikuang Simpu, tadamaan ko nidemakan ningra saka pacekilan no itiraay finawlan, sacisowal sa ko finawlan a pangangan "O coyoh no kawaliay" . O sapikihamonan ni Pan Sikuang Simpu to kasaniyaro', minanam to kowaping, Payrang sowal, 'Amis a sowal . I Afih niyaro' ko aro' ni Pan Sikuang Simpu, saka pangangan sa ko 'Amis a tamdaw i cingraan i paka ci "Mamet" han, o patodong tata'ang ko kamay ningra, mamamamet to kamay i mimetmet ko kamay ningra, ano eca ci'icel ko pimetmet saan ko pasowal . I 1967 miheca, patireng to Hualiensien Lute hopedan kociwsiya. Halafinay miheca i, o sapipa'icel to niyaro'ay a 'Amis tamdaw saka pi'imer to sowal no niyah ato pidotoc to ponka, minanam to sowal no 'Amis, aci Rev. Fr. Louis Pourrias tatosa malekapot mikawit to sowal no 'Amis "'Amis sowal ‚Äď France sowal", "'Amis Fangcalay cudad", "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" a sakadademak4) . Sa:an i, I niyaro' no 'Amis patireng to Yociying, paiyoan ato kadadipotan no mato'asay no niyaro'; halafin ko patado ato mikihar to dadamaen no niyaro', saka falic no niyaro' a ponka, kiwiko, isingan, kicay a demak, "O coyoh no kawaliay" han ko pipangangan i cingraan. I 2015 miheca, o nano France a pitelek to "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" (Dictionnaire Amis-Fran√ßais), milaheci to sapiterek to ponka no 'Amis, orasaka mapakaolah no Conghuaminko kiwikopo patodong to "105 miheca tadamaanay sakiniyah sowal kompay" . I 2017 miheca, Conghuaminko sifo mihamon mikinafalahay demak 60 miheca a roray, o Lalomaan nidemakay masadakay patodong to kacingangan no Conghuaminko . I 2018 miheca 3 folad 16 romi'ad, ciadada to atay a kang a mapatay, 89 no 'orip ningra i hakal . Toya miheca 3 folad 24 romi'ad, itira i pipatadaan ningra Afih Tinsokiwkay mimisa padongos itiya, o Yincuminco wuyinhuy patodong to katadamaan ningra to saki yincumin no Taywan, patodong to "saka tosa yincumin tadamanay a pakaolah" . I 8 folad 11 romi'ad, Yincuminco wiyinhuy kakeridan ci Iciyang Parod midayhiw to Congtong ci Cay Inwen patodong to patadamaan no Congtong, todong no Cenfo saki ci Pan Sikuang Simpuan kaitini i Taywan to 58 miheca a patado, tadamaan ko pidipot ato pikinafalah to 'orip saki yincumin, "Pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis/Pangcah" mikawit to ponka miterek a demak ko piahowid .

**** mińß…ô ¶a, mapatir…ôŇč to~u no~u tinso~ukiw a simpo~u~u; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mao~u ¶o~ur no~u tinso~ukiw paris wajfaŇč tito~ukiwkaj (missio~uns …ôtraŇč*r…ôs …¨~…ģ…ô paris, m…ôp) mao~u ¶o~ur tajni i ka…ĺiŇčko~u no~u tajwan ma…ĺa pat…ônakaj. kataja…ĺan ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u mipat…ônak itira i po~usko~u, fo~u~u…ĺi no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, kawa…ĺi no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw °amis a nijaro~u °, iko~ur no~u pipat…ônak ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u, ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan niŇčra saka pa ¶…ôki…ĺan no~u itiraaj finaw…ĺan, sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u finaw…ĺan a paŇčaŇčan "o~u ¶o~ujo~uńß no~u kawa…ĺiaj" . o~u sapikińßamo~unan ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u to~u kasanijaro~u °, minanam to~u ko~uwapiŇč, pajraŇč so~uwa…ĺ, °amis a so~uwa…ĺ . i afińß nijaro~u ° ko~u aro~u ° ni pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~u, saka paŇčaŇčan sa ko~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw i ¶iŇčraan i paka ¶i "mam…ôt" ńßan, o~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč tata °aŇč ko~u kamaj niŇčra, mamamam…ôt to~u kamaj i mim…ôtm…ôt ko~u kamaj niŇčra, ano~u …ô ¶a ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u pim…ôtm…ôt saan ko~u paso~uwa…ĺ . i **** mińß…ô ¶a, patir…ôŇč to~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ônsi…ôn …ĺo~u~ut…ô ńßo~up…ô…¨~…ģan ko~u ¶iwsija. ńßa…ĺafinaj mińß…ô ¶a i, o~u sapipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u nijaro~u °aj a °amis tam…¨~…ģaw saka pi °im…ôr to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u nijańß ato~u pi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u po~unka, minanam to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, a ¶i r…ôb~v. fr. …ĺo~uo~u~uis po~uo~u~urrias tato~usa ma…ĺ…ôkapo~ut mikawit to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis " °amis so~uwa…ĺ * fran ¶…ô so~uwa…ĺ", " °amis faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ", "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" a saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak*) . sa:an i, i nijaro~u ° no~u °amis patir…ôŇč to~u jo~u ¶ijiŇč, paijo~uan ato~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģipo~utan no~u mato~u °asaj no~u nijaro~u °; ńßa…ĺafin ko~u pata…¨~…ģo~u ato~u mikińßar to~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģama…ôn no~u nijaro~u °, saka fa…ĺi ¶ no~u nijaro~u ° a po~unka, kiwiko~u, isiŇčan, ki ¶aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, "o~u ¶o~ujo~uńß no~u kawa…ĺiaj" ńßan ko~u pipaŇčaŇčan i ¶iŇčraan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u nano~u fran ¶…ô a pit…ô…ĺ…ôk to~u "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" (…¨~…ģi ¶tio~unnair…ô amis-fran*ais), mi…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u sapit…ôr…ôk to~u po~unka no~u °amis, o~urasaka mapakao~u…ĺańß no~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u kiwiko~upo~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u "*** mińß…ô ¶a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj sakinijańß so~uwa…ĺ ko~umpaj" . i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u mińßamo~un mikinafa…ĺańßaj …¨~…ģ…ômak ** mińß…ô ¶a a ro~uraj, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan ni…¨~…ģ…ômakaj masa…¨~…ģakaj pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan no~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u . i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u ataj a kaŇč a mapataj, ** no~u °o~urip niŇčra i ńßaka…ĺ . to~uja mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, itira i pipata…¨~…ģaan niŇčra afińß tinso~ukiwkaj mimisa pa…¨~…ģo~uŇčo~us itija, o~u jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u wo~u~ujinńßo~u~uj pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u kata…¨~…ģamaan niŇčra to~u saki jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan, pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u "saka to~usa jin ¶o~u~umin ta…¨~…ģamanaj a pakao~u…ĺańß" . i * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u wijinńßo~u~uj kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i i ¶ijaŇč paro~u…¨~…ģ mi…¨~…ģajńßiw to~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ¶i ¶aj inw…ôn pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u pata…¨~…ģamaan no~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ¶…ônfo~u saki ¶i pan siko~u~uaŇč simpo~u~uan kaitini i tajwan to~u ** mińß…ô ¶a a pata…¨~…ģo~u, ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut ato~u pikinafa…ĺańß to~u °o~urip saki jin ¶o~u~umin, "pi…¨~…ģafo~u °an to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß" mikawit to~u po~unka mit…ôr…ôk a …¨~…ģ…ômak ko~u piańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ .
